message:
Update Cargo.lock for upstream dependency changes

Lockfile regenerated to reflect upstream version bumps and dependency
changes across the workspace: asupersync 0.2.6→0.2.7 (tokio→futures-lite
migration), frankenjax crate additions (fj-ad, fj-lax, fj-trace, half,
rayon), frankensqlite extensions (fsqlite-ext-icu, fsqlite-ext-misc,
smallvec), and transitive dependency updates (getrandom, nix/memoffset,
futures-core/io/lite, parking).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
